{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Ruler badge
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A [[Ruler badge]] is a type of badge available to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
